title: MaceLimiter++
description: it adds a configurable limit to maces for smps and servers with announcement when a mace is created and tells when a mace wielder logs in
body:
## ⚔️ MaceLimiter — Legendary Mace Control for PvP Servers

**https://kodari.ai/?ref=DEVIL 
AI WHICH MAKES YOUR PLUGIN IDEAS INTO REALITY GIVES A READY TO IMPLEMENT .JAR FILE 
CHECK IT OUT**


**_ALSO JOIN MY DISCORD SERVER TO PLAY ON A PVP SMP WITH CUSTOM PLUGINS AND MORE !!!!!_**

**MaceLimiter** is a powerful Paper plugin that gives server owners **full control over the Mace**.
Designed for competitive and PvP-focused servers, it prevents abuse, duplication, and hoarding while making every mace feel **truly legendary**.

---

### 🔒 Core Features

* **Global Mace Limit**
  Set a maximum number of maces allowed on the entire server.

* **One Mace Per Player**
  Each player can own **only ONE mace** — no hoarding, no exploits.

* **Craft Control & Announcements**

  * Blocks crafting if limits are reached
  * Broadcasts a configurable message when a mace is successfully crafted
  * No coordinates or location leaks

* **Offline-Safe Tracking**
  Tracks mace holders even when players are offline.

---

### 📜 Commands

```
/mace holders   → View all current mace holders (online & offline)
/mace give      → Admin-only mace distribution
/mace remove    → Remove a mace from a player
/mace purge     → Remove all maces from the server
/mace reload    → Reload configuration
```

---

### 🎆 Visual & Audio Effects

* **Purple glow effect** when a mace is dropped
* **Configurable sound effect** for extra impact
* Optional pickup cooldown to prevent abuse

---

### 🚫 Storage & Exploit Protection

Maces **CANNOT** be stored in:

* Chests, ender chests, barrels
* Shulker boxes
* Hoppers, droppers, dispensers
* Item frames & glow item frames
* Decorated pots
* Any container or automation system

Includes **anti-dupe protection** and PersistentDataContainer tagging to prevent fake or duplicated maces.

---

### 🔔 Notifications

* Optional join & leave broadcasts for mace holders
* Fully configurable messages

---

### ⚙️ Technical Details

* ✅ Paper 1.21.x
* ✅ Java 17
* ✅ No NMS
* ✅ Lightweight & performance-safe
* ✅ Fully configurable
* ✅ Production-ready

---

### 🎯 Perfect For

* PvP servers
* Competitive SMPs
* Factions & Lifesteal-style servers
* Any server that wants **rare, controlled legendary weapons**

---

If you want the mace to feel **earned**, **limited**, and **legendary**,
**MaceLimiter** is the plugin you’re looking for.
